button.name: btn_rotate_left_10
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 10° to the left

button.name: btn_rotate_left_1
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 1° to the left

button.name: btn_rotate_right_1
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 1° to the right

button.name: btn_rotate_right_10
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 10° to the right

button.name: btn_rotate_left_90
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 90° to the left

button.name: btn_rotate_left_45
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 45° to the left

button.name: btn_rotate_right_45
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 45° to the right

button.name: btn_rotate_right_90
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar 90° to the right

button.name: btn_nearest
button.label: To nearest cardinal
button.tool_tip: Rotate your avatar towards nearest cardinal
